title: viola × ekstroemiana
intro: Viola × ekstroemiana, also known as Ekström's viola, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Viola, resulting from the cross between Viola biflora and Viola palustris. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a diuretic and to treat inflammation. The health benefits of Viola × ekstroemiana include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Viola × ekstroemiana typically involve making tea from the leaves and flowers, or using it in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
